data_description.scan_interval: How often to refresh data from VSware (minimum 60 minutes). VSware updates attendance and behaviour data at most once per school day, so polling more frequently would have no effect.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your username and password.
error.cannot_fetch_user: Logged in but failed to retrieve user details.
error.no_learners: No students found for this account.
error.scan_interval_too_low: Scan interval must be at least 60 minutes.
